summary: Backend testing for Lead Auto-Approve and Email Sequence for €67 Analysis Sale. All 19 tests passed (100%). Tested auto-approve settings CRUD, manual trigger, email sequence start/stop, 4 lead sequence email templates, and Celery task integration.
critical_code_review_comments: Email sending is delegated to Systeme.io via tags - if SYSTEME_API_KEY is not configured, the tag is not added but the flow continues gracefully
Celery beat schedule includes 'process-auto-approve-leads' task running every hour
Email templates are editable via /api/admin/email-templates endpoints (WYSIWYG support ready)
seed_data_creation: Multiple test leads created during testing with pattern test_*@example.com - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lead auto-approve and email sequence fully functional. Celery worker and beat running on 'analisi_automation' queue. Auto-approve criteria: score >= 80 AND target_fit_level = 'altissimo'. Email sequence: 4 emails at D+0, D+2, D+4, D+7. Templates editable via admin API.

auto_approve_settings.disable_auto_approve: ✅ Can disable auto-approve by setting enabled=false

email_sequence.duplicate_start_prevention: ✅ Returns success=false if sequence already started

email_templates.GET /api/admin/email-templates/lead_sequ: ✅ Offerta €67 con CTA (variables: nome, link_checkout, unsubscribe_link)

celery_integration.send_lead_sequence_email task: ✅ Executes and updates lead record with email_sequence_step_1_sent=true

lead_crud.POST /api/discovery/leads: ✅ Creates lead with score and target_fit_level

mocked_apis.systeme_io: Email sending delegated to Systeme.io via tags. If SYSTEME_API_KEY not configured, tag not added but flow continues.
mocked_apis.note: This is NOT a mock - it's graceful degradation. Real Systeme.io integration is called.

additional_checks: Lead must have valid email (not @discovery.evolutionpro.it placeholder)
Lead status must not be 'rejected' or 'converted'
